##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/budget/import/subject 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/import/subject 
 ## 接口描述 
支持外部系统通过接口导入预算科目信息进入费控，不支持部分成功 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"opsEmpNumber","required":true,"label":"%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E4%BA%BA%09","exampleValue":"001","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%0D%0A%0D%0A%0D%0A"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"subjectTypes","required":false,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5%E5%88%99%E8%BF%9B%E8%A1%8C%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%0A%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5100%E6%9D%A1","maxLength":"100"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetSubTypeId","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BBID","exampleValue":"z001","desc":"%20%E4%BB%85%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%97%E5%92%8C%E5%AD%97%E6%AF%8D","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetSubTypeName","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"api%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB","desc":"%20%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","maxLength":"150"}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"subjects","required":true,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5100%E6%9D%A1","maxLength":"100"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"expIds","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8Bid%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"01%2C02","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%A5%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E5%88%86%E5%89%B2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"subName","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"api%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B01-1","desc":"%20%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"subTypeId","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BBID","exampleValue":"z001","desc":"%20%E4%BB%85%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%97%E5%92%8C%E5%AD%97%E6%AF%8D","maxLength":"50"}}]}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%09","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%09","exampleValue":"false","desc":"%20true%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0D%0Afalse%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"errors","required":false,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%8C%E8%BF%99%E9%87%8C%E4%BC%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E5%85%B7%E4%BD%93%E7%9A%84%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%0D%0A%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E6%98%AF%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%8C%E5%88%99%E4%B8%BA%E8%BF%99%E9%87%8C%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"type","required":false,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E7%9A%84%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","desc":"%20%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%0A%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%0A%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%0A%E5%85%81%E8%AE%B8%E5%8D%A0%E7%94%A8%E7%9A%84%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%2F%E8%A1%A5%E8%B4%B4%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"index","required":false,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E7%9A%84%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%BA%8F%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"1","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"msg","required":false,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E7%9A%84%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E3%80%90api%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB1%E3%80%91%E5%B7%B2%E5%AD%98%E5%9C%A8%22%2C%22%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E3%80%90api%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB1%E3%80%91%E6%9C%89%E9%87%8D%E5%A4%8D%E9%A1%B9%22%5D","desc":"%20%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%8C%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0%E4%B8%BA%E5%85%B7%E4%BD%93%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%E5%AD%97%E7%AC%A6%E4%B8%B2"},"children":[],"open":false}]}]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%09","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0D%0Afalse%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%09","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":""}}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 #### 请求报文
```json
{
  "opsEmpNumber": "2",
  "subjectTypes": [
    {
      "budgetSubTypeId": "z001",
      "budgetSubTypeName": "api导入科目分类1"
    }
  ],
  "subjects": [
    {
      "expIds": "01,02",
      "subName": "api测试科目名称1-1",
      "subTypeId": "z001"
    }
  ]
}
```
#### 响应报文
#### 接口调用失败的报文，示例仅为其中一部分失败样例
```json
{
    "success": false,
    "message": "导入的预算科目分类和预算科目为空"
}
```
#### 导入成功的报文
```json
{
    "data": {
        "success": true,
        "errors": []
    },
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}
```
#### 导入失败的报文，示例仅为其中一部分失败样例
```json
{
    "data": {
        "success": false,
        "errors": [
            {
                "type": "预算科目分类编码",
                "index": 1,
                "msg": [
                    "预算科目分类编码【z001】已存在"
                ]
            }
        ]
    },
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}
```  
## 错误码说明 
外层success为接口调用状态 true为成功 其余都是失败
data内的sucess为实际导入成功状态， true为成功 其余都是失败

常见报错如下：
对于导入的预算科目分类列表：
预算科目分类编码【xx】已存在
预算科目分类编码【xx】有重复项
预算科目分类名称【xx】已存在
预算科目分类名称【xx】有重复项
预算科目分类名称不能为空
预算科目未配置费用或补助

对于导入的预算科目列表：
允许占用的费用/补贴类型【xx】不存在
同一个科目不允许存在相同的费用/补贴类型
预算科目名称【xx】已存在
预算科目名称【xx】有重复项
预算科目名称不能为空
科目所属分类【xx】不存在
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/budget/import/subject

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/budget/import/subject

接口描述

支持外部系统通过接口导入预算科目信息进入费控，不支持部分成功

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"请求体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"opsEmpNumber","required":true,"label":"%E6%93%8D%E4%BD%9C%E4%BA%BA%09","exampleValue":"001","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%0D%0A%0D%0A%0D%0A"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"subjectTypes","required":false,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5%E5%88%99%E8%BF%9B%E8%A1%8C%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%0A%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5100%E6%9D%A1","maxLength":"100"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetSubTypeId","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BBID","exampleValue":"z001","desc":"%20%E4%BB%85%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%97%E5%92%8C%E5%AD%97%E6%AF%8D","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"budgetSubTypeName","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"api%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB","desc":"%20%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","maxLength":"150"}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"subjects","required":true,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E6%9C%80%E5%A4%9A%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E4%BC%A0%E5%85%A5100%E6%9D%A1","maxLength":"100"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"expIds","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%85%B3%E8%81%94%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8Bid%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"01%2C02","desc":"%20%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%EF%BC%8C%E4%BB%A5%E8%8B%B1%E6%96%87%E9%80%97%E5%8F%B7%2C%E5%88%86%E5%89%B2"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"subName","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"api%E6%B5%8B%E8%AF%95%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B01-1","desc":"%20%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"subTypeId","required":true,"label":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E6%89%80%E5%B1%9E%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BBID","exampleValue":"z001","desc":"%20%E4%BB%85%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E6%95%B0%E5%AD%97%E5%92%8C%E5%AD%97%E6%AF%8D","maxLength":"50"}}]}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"query根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应头根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"响应体根节点","label":"虚拟根节点"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"data","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%09","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E6%98%AF%E5%90%A6%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%09","exampleValue":"false","desc":"%20true%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0D%0Afalse%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"errors","required":false,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"%20%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%EF%BC%8C%E8%BF%99%E9%87%8C%E4%BC%9A%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E5%85%B7%E4%BD%93%E7%9A%84%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%0D%0A%E5%A6%82%E6%9E%9C%E6%98%AF%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%8C%E5%88%99%E4%B8%BA%E8%BF%99%E9%87%8C%E4%B8%BA%E7%A9%BA"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"type","required":false,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E7%9A%84%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","desc":"%20%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%0A%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%0A%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%0A%E5%85%81%E8%AE%B8%E5%8D%A0%E7%94%A8%E7%9A%84%E8%B4%B9%E7%94%A8%2F%E8%A1%A5%E8%B4%B4%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"index","required":false,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E7%9A%84%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%BA%8F%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"1","desc":""}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"msg","required":false,"label":"%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E7%9A%84%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"%5B%22%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E3%80%90api%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB1%E3%80%91%E5%B7%B2%E5%AD%98%E5%9C%A8%22%2C%22%E9%A2%84%E7%AE%97%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E3%80%90api%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E7%A7%91%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%86%E7%B1%BB1%E3%80%91%E6%9C%89%E9%87%8D%E5%A4%8D%E9%A1%B9%22%5D","desc":"%20%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8%EF%BC%8C%E5%85%83%E7%B4%A0%E4%B8%BA%E5%85%B7%E4%BD%93%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0%E5%AD%97%E7%AC%A6%E4%B8%B2"},"children":[],"open":false}]}]},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%09","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0D%0Afalse%E8%AF%B4%E6%98%8E%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","required":false,"label":"%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF%09","exampleValue":"%E8%B0%83%E7%94%A8%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%EF%BC%81","desc":""}}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

{
  "opsEmpNumber": "2",
  "subjectTypes": [
    {
      "budgetSubTypeId": "z001",
      "budgetSubTypeName": "api导入科目分类1"
    }
  ],
  "subjects": [
    {
      "expIds": "01,02",
      "subName": "api测试科目名称1-1",
      "subTypeId": "z001"
    }
  ]
}

响应报文

接口调用失败的报文，示例仅为其中一部分失败样例

{
    "success": false,
    "message": "导入的预算科目分类和预算科目为空"
}

导入成功的报文

{
    "data": {
        "success": true,
        "errors": []
    },
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}

导入失败的报文，示例仅为其中一部分失败样例

{
    "data": {
        "success": false,
        "errors": [
            {
                "type": "预算科目分类编码",
                "index": 1,
                "msg": [
                    "预算科目分类编码【z001】已存在"
                ]
            }
        ]
    },
    "success": true,
    "message": "调用成功！"
}

错误码说明

外层success为接口调用状态 true为成功 其余都是失败 data内的sucess为实际导入成功状态， true为成功 其余都是失败

常见报错如下： 对于导入的预算科目分类列表： 预算科目分类编码【xx】已存在 预算科目分类编码【xx】有重复项 预算科目分类名称【xx】已存在 预算科目分类名称【xx】有重复项 预算科目分类名称不能为空 预算科目未配置费用或补助

对于导入的预算科目列表： 允许占用的费用/补贴类型【xx】不存在 同一个科目不允许存在相同的费用/补贴类型 预算科目名称【xx】已存在 预算科目名称【xx】有重复项 预算科目名称不能为空 科目所属分类【xx】不存在
